H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
φ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))
          ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
φ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))
          ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
φ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [(⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
       ∧ ψ
         [(⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
          [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)))
             [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
          ]tm])
      ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm]
        ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)))
              [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
           ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
φ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
        π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
          π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
        π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
        ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
          π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
φ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₁
         (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
     π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
   ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
     ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
       π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
  [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
tm ((W ×h X) ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
 exact (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var _)) , π₂ (tm_var _) ⟩).
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
φ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₁
         (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
     π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
   ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
     ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
       π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
  [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y),
   ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
φ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
    π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
    [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y),
     ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ ψ
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
      π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y),
       ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩ ]tm])
  ∧ (π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y),
     ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]
    ∧ (π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
       π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
      [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y),
       ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
φ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)))
    ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
φ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
φ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)))
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))

  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y

                 exact (partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined ψ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
∃h ((φ
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
     ∧ ψ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
       ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]) ⊢ ψ
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
         π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
∃h ((φ
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
     ∧ ψ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
       π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
       ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]) ⊢ ψ
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
(∃h ((φ
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
        π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
        ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
∧ (φ
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
    π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
    π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
   ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
    π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
   ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
    π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
⊢ ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),

∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
⊢ ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) X
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
⊢ ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) X
y':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
⊢ ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])

  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
⊢ ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

W, X, Y: partial_setoid H

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
         π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
tm (W ×h Y) W
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ ⊢ ?x ~ ?x
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ?x [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
          ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
tm (W ×h Y) W
 exact (π₁ (tm_var _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ ⊢ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h Y)) ~ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h Y))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ ⊢ ψ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h Y)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h Y)) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ ⊢ ψ [tm_var (W ×h Y)]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ ⊢ ψ

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (W ×h Y)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
          ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (W ×h Y)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((φ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
          ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (W ×h Y)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [(⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)))
           [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
       ∧ ψ
         [(⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
          [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)))
             [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
          ]tm])
      ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
         π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm]
        ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
           ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))),
        π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))),
          π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))
          ⟩])
      ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
        π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))
        ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
          π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
tm ((W ×h Y) ×h X) (X ×h Y)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₁
         (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))),
     π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
   ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
     π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))
     ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))))
  [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
tm ((W ×h Y) ×h X) (X ×h Y)
 exact (⟨ π₂ (tm_var _) , π₂ (π₁ (tm_var _)) ⟩).
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ π₁
         (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))),
     π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
   ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
     π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))
     ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))))
  [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X),
   ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))),
    π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
    [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X),
     ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩ ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ ψ
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))),
      π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X),
       ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩ ⟩ ]tm])
  ∧ (π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
     π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))))
    [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X),
     ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩ ⟩]
    ∧ (π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
       π₂
         (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)))))
      [⟨ tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X),
       ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩ ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
   ∧ ψ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))
    ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)))

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),

⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)))

  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H

ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y

[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]

  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ φ

  π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))
  ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)))

  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]
⊢ ψ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  (** * 4. The uniqueness *)
  Context {χ : partial_setoid_morphism W (prod_partial_setoid X Y)}
          (p₁ : partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ)
          (p₂ : partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ).

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ = pair_partial_setoid_morphism

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ = pair_partial_setoid_morphism

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
 π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩] ⊢ χ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ (∃h (χ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))
          ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ ∃h (χ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
            π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
              π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
           ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
tm (W ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ (χ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
tm (W ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
 exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ (χ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ χ
  [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
   [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))
    ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
    [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
     [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y),
      π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
      [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
       [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y),
        π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)))
    ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~
      π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)))

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ χ [tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)]
  ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)))
    ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~
      π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)))

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ χ
  ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)))
    ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~
      π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)))

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ ⊢ χ
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)))

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ ⊢ χ
 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ

  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y

  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ

  π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h prod_partial_setoid X Y)),
   π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ ⊢ χ [tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)]

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ ⊢ χ

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ (∃h (χ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
          π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
          ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ ∃h (χ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
         π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
            π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
              π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
           ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
tm (W ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ (χ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
      π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
tm (W ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
 exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ (χ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
      π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ χ
  [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
   [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))
    ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
     π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))))
    [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
     [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y),
      π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      [(⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
       [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y),
        π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)))
    ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~
      π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)))

χ
⊢ χ [tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)]
  ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~

    ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ~

χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ
⊢ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h prod_partial_setoid X Y)),
   π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ ⊢ χ [tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)]

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
χ ⊢ χ

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
φ
[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
 π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩] ⊢ χ

ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y

  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W

[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
 π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩] ⊢ χ

y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y

[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
 π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
∧ ψ

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
φ
[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
 π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩] ⊢ χ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
Δ ⊢ χ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y

W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X

ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y

  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
Δ ⊢ χ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
Δ
∧ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
     (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y)) [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ χ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
Δ
∧ (∃h (χ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))
          ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ χ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
Δ
∧ ∃h (χ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
           ]tm]) ⊢ χ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
∃h (χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
∧ Δ ⊢ χ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
(∃h (χ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
       ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
          [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
 ∧ Δ) [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
      ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
((∃h (χ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
          [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
           ]tm]))
 [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
 ∧ Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))])
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
      ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
(∃h (χ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
       ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
          [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
             ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
∧ Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y

p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ

q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))

        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ

q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))

     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩

        [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,

    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩

        [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,

      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),

W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
    π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm ~
    (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm
    ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
      ]tm ~
      (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
      ]tm ⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y)): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) W
x:= π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X ×h Y))): tm (W ×h X ×h Y) Y
Δ:= φ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ w, y ⟩]: form (W ×h X ×h Y)
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
  π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))) ⟩])
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
    ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
      π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
(φ
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
  π₁ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))) ⟩])
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]

 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),

tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W

W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
(χ
 [⟨ w,
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₁)
∧ χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₃ ~ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₃ ~ π₂ xy₂
⊢ ?x₁ ~ w

W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)

(χ
 [⟨ w,
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₁)
∧ χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₃ ~ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₃ ~ π₂ xy₂
⊢ χ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y

p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ

w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W

  (π₁
     (tm_var

           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)

tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
 exact w.

 [⟨ w,

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)

χ
[⟨ w,
 π₂
   (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
 ⟩] ⊢ χ [⟨ w, xy₁ ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

 π₂
   (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
 ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₁
⊢ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₁ ⊢ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ⊢ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
(χ
 [⟨ w,
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₁)
∧ χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₃ ~ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₃ ~ π₂ xy₂
⊢ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W

p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
