  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W

  (π₁
     (tm_var

tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) Y
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y

  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ

  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W

  (π₁
     (tm_var

  (π₁

           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)

(χ
 [⟨ w,
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₁)

⊢ π₂ xy₁ ~ ?y
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W

  (π₁

  (π₁

           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)

(χ
 [⟨ w,

    (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₁)

⊢ ?y ~ π₂ xy₂

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) Y
 exact (π₂ xy₃).

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
(χ
 [⟨ w,
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₁)
∧ χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₃ ~ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₃ ~ π₂ xy₂
⊢ χ [⟨ ?x, xy₁ ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
χ
[⟨ w,
 π₂
   (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
 ⟩] ⊢ χ [⟨ w, xy₁ ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
(χ
 [⟨ w,
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₁)
∧ χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₃ ~ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₃ ~ π₂ xy₂
⊢ χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₃ ~ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₃ ~ π₂ xy₂
⊢ χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩]

                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩] ⊢ χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
(χ
 [⟨ w,
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₁)
∧ χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₃ ~ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₃ ~ π₂ xy₂
⊢ π₂ xy₃ ~ π₂ xy₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
π₂ xy₃ ~ π₂ xy₂ ⊢ π₂ xy₃ ~ π₂ xy₂

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
(χ
 [⟨ w,
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₁ ~ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ~ π₂ xy₁)
∧ χ [⟨ w, xy₃ ⟩] ∧ π₁ xy₃ ~ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₃ ~ π₂ xy₂
⊢ χ [⟨ w, xy₁ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
W, X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
ψ: partial_setoid_morphism W Y
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y)
p₁: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y) = φ
p₂: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y) = ψ
w:= π₁
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) W
xy₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
χ
[⟨ w,
 π₂
   (π₁ (tm_var (((W ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
 ⟩] ⊢ χ [⟨ w, xy₁ ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.
End Pairing.

Arguments pair_partial_setoid_morphism_form {H W X Y} φ ψ /.

(** * 5. Binary products of partial setoids *)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
BinProducts (category_of_partial_setoids H)


H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
BinProducts (category_of_partial_setoids H)

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
BinProduct (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
category_of_partial_setoids H
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ ?c, X ⟧
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ ?c, Y ⟧
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
isBinProduct (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y ?c 
  ?f ?g

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
category_of_partial_setoids H
 exact (prod_partial_setoid X Y).
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
category_of_partial_setoids H
⟦ prod_partial_setoid X Y, X ⟧
 exact (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y).
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
category_of_partial_setoids H
⟦ prod_partial_setoid X Y, Y ⟧
 exact (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y).
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
isBinProduct (category_of_partial_setoids H) X Y
  (prod_partial_setoid X Y) (partial_setoid_pr1 X Y)
  (partial_setoid_pr2 X Y)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, W: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
∃! fg : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
        prod_partial_setoid X Y ⟧,
fg · partial_setoid_pr1 X Y = φ
× fg · partial_setoid_pr2 X Y = ψ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, W: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
∑
fg : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
     prod_partial_setoid X Y ⟧,
fg · partial_setoid_pr1 X Y = φ
× fg · partial_setoid_pr2 X Y = ψ
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, W: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
∏
t : ∑
    fg : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
         prod_partial_setoid X Y ⟧,
    fg · partial_setoid_pr1 X Y = φ
    × fg · partial_setoid_pr2 X Y = ψ, t = ?x

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, W: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
∑
fg : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
     prod_partial_setoid X Y ⟧,
fg · partial_setoid_pr1 X Y = φ
× fg · partial_setoid_pr2 X Y = ψ
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, W: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
prod_partial_setoid X Y ⟧
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, W: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
?pr1 · partial_setoid_pr1 X Y = φ
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, W: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
(λ _ : ?pr1 · partial_setoid_pr1 X Y = φ,
 ?pr1 · partial_setoid_pr2 X Y = ψ) ?pr10

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, W: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
prod_partial_setoid X Y ⟧
 exact (pair_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, W: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
pair_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ
· partial_setoid_pr1 X Y = φ
 apply pair_partial_setoid_morphism_pr1.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, W: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
(λ _ : pair_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ
       · partial_setoid_pr1 X Y = φ,
 pair_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ
 · partial_setoid_pr2 X Y = ψ)
  (pair_partial_setoid_morphism_pr1 φ ψ)
 apply pair_partial_setoid_morphism_pr2.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y, W: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, Y ⟧
∏
t : ∑
    fg : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
         prod_partial_setoid X Y ⟧,
    fg · partial_setoid_pr1 X Y = φ
    × fg · partial_setoid_pr2 X Y = ψ,
t =
pair_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ,,
pair_partial_setoid_morphism_pr1 φ ψ,,
pair_partial_setoid_morphism_pr2 φ ψ
 abstract
        (intros χ ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property | ] ;
         exact (pair_partial_setoid_morphism_unique _ _ (pr12 χ) (pr22 χ))).
Defined.

(** * 6. Preservation of binary products by the constant object functor *)
Section PreservesBinProductConstant.
  Context {H : first_order_hyperdoctrine}
          (X Y : ty H).

  Definition preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form
    : form
        (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X) (eq_partial_setoid Y)
         ×h
         eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
    := π₁ (tm_var _) ≡ π₂ (tm_var _).

  Arguments preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form /.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined_law
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined_law
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_mor_eq_defined_law
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined_law
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
           ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
   ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
   ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
(π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
 ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
               ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)
                             ×h X ×h Y)))),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
              ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
                 ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)
                                ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
                 π₂
                   (tm_var
                      (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)
                       ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)
                           ×h X ×h Y))) ~
                  π₂
                    (tm_var
                       (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)
                        ×h X ×h Y)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
   ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
   ⟩]
  ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
     ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
     ⟩]
    ⇒ π₂
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
      π₂
        (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))

((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
   ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
   ⟩]

  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
(π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
 ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
[⟨ π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
 π₂
   (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
 ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
   ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
(π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
 ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
[⟨ π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
 π₂
   (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
 ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
   ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))

π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
≡ π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
∧ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
  ≡ π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))

  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)) ~
      π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))
      ⇒ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
             ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))
  ⇒ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
         ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
       ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
       ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
tm (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
    ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
tm (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
 exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
    ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
   [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y), π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))
  ≡ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X ×h Y))

        apply hyperdoctrine_refl.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_morphism
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_morphism
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
form
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y)
   ×h eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ?φ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
form
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y)
   ×h eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
 exact preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_form
 exact preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_laws.
  Defined.

  Let φ
    : partial_setoid_morphism
        (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
        (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X) (eq_partial_setoid Y))
    := pair_partial_setoid_morphism
         (term_partial_setoid_morphism
            (BinProductPr1 _ (hyperdoctrine_binproducts _ X Y)))
         (term_partial_setoid_morphism
            (BinProductPr2 _ (hyperdoctrine_binproducts _ X Y))).

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv
  φ =
id_partial_setoid_morphism
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))

  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))

partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv
  (pair_partial_setoid_morphism

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
(∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
      ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
         ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₁
           (π₂
              (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
         ⟩]
        ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm
           ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
          [⟨ π₁
               (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
           π₂
             (π₂
                (tm_var
                   ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
        ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
   ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
      ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
      ⟩]
     ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
        [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm
        ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂
          (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
        ⟩])
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
     ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
(π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
 ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
    [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
    ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
    π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
   ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm
      ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
      ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
(π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
≡ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
∧ (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
    [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
    π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
   ]tm)
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
  ]tm
  ≡ ((π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
      ⟩ ]tm)
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
     ⟩ ]tm
  ∧ (((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm)
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
      ⟩ ]tm)
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
     ⟩ ]tm
    ≡ ((π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂
          (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
        ⟩ ]tm)
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂
         (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
       ⟩ ]tm
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
≡ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
∧ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ≡ π₁
      (π₂
         (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
  ∧ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
    ≡ π₂
        (π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
⊢ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))

φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism

  (term_partial_setoid_morphism

        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
xy₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)

xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₁ ≡ xy₃ ∧ π₁ xy₃ ≡ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₃ ≡ π₂ xy₂
⊢ xy₁ ~ xy₂

xy₁ ≡ xy₃ ∧ π₁ xy₃ ≡ π₁ xy₂ ∧ π₂ xy₃ ≡ π₂ xy₂
⊢ π₁ xy₁ ≡ π₁ xy₃

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
id_partial_setoid_morphism
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism
    preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv
    (pair_partial_setoid_morphism
       (term_partial_setoid_morphism
          (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))))
       (term_partial_setoid_morphism
          (π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
       ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
          ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
         [⟨ π₁
              (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₁
            (π₂
               (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
          ⟩]
         ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y))
            ]tm
            ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
           [⟨ π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
            π₂
              (π₂
                 (tm_var
                    ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
            ⟩])
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
         ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
    ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
       ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₁
         (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
       ⟩]
      ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm
         ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂
           (π₂
              (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
         ⟩])
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
      ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
 exact (π₁ (tm_var _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ ((π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
    ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
       ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₁
         (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
       ⟩]
      ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm
         ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂
           (π₂
              (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
         ⟩])
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
      ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y),
   π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
  ≡ π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
  ∧ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
    ≡ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
    ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
      ≡ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))

     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
partial_setoid_comp_morphism φ
  preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv =
id_partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))

  (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y) =
π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y))

  (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y) =

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
(∃h ((((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
       ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₁
         (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
       ⟩]
      ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm
         ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂
           (π₂
              (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
         ⟩])
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
        ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₂
          (π₁
             (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
        ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]
∧ (((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
    [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
    ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
    π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
   ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm
      ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
      ⟩])
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
     ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
     ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
(((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
  ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
 [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
  π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
 ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
    [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm
    ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
    π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩])
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
 π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
   ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
((((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
   [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm)
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
  ]tm)
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
 ≡ ((π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
     ⟩ ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
 ∧ (((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm)
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
     ⟩ ]tm)
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
   ≡ ((π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂
         (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
       ⟩ ]tm)
     [⟨ π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩
     ]tm)
∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ⟩
  ]tm
  ≡ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
     ⟩ ]tm
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
(π₁
   (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
 ≡ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
 ∧ π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
   ≡ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
  ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
⊢ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))

φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism

  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))

xy₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)

   (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
 ≡ π₁ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
 ∧ π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
   ≡ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
  ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
⊢ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))

        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
   ≡ π₂ (π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
∧ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
  ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
⊢ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
xy₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
(π₁ xy₁ ≡ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ≡ π₂ xy₃) ∧ xy₃ ≡ xy₂
⊢ xy₁ ~ xy₂

     (eq_partial_setoid Y))

xy₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) Y
 exact (π₂ xy₃).
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
xy₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
(π₁ xy₁ ≡ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ≡ π₂ xy₃) ∧ xy₃ ≡ xy₂
⊢ π₂ xy₁ ≡ π₂ xy₃

X, Y: ty H

xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
π₁ xy₁ ≡ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ≡ π₂ xy₃ ⊢ π₂ xy₁ ≡ π₂ xy₃

     (eq_partial_setoid Y))

xy₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)

π₂ xy₁ ≡ π₂ xy₃ ⊢ π₂ xy₁ ≡ π₂ xy₃

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

(π₁ xy₁ ≡ π₁ xy₃ ∧ π₂ xy₁ ≡ π₂ xy₃) ∧ xy₃ ≡ xy₂

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
xy₁:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
xy₃ ≡ xy₂ ⊢ xy₃ ≡ xy₂

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
id_partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
⊢ partial_setoid_comp_morphism
    (pair_partial_setoid_morphism
       (term_partial_setoid_morphism
          (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y))))
       (term_partial_setoid_morphism
          (π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))))
    preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ ∃h ((((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
        [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
        ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
        π₁
          (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
        ⟩]
       ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm
          ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
         [⟨ π₁
              (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
          π₂
            (π₂
               (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
          ⟩])
      [⟨ π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
         ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
        [⟨ π₂
             (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
         ⟩])

  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ ((((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
     ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
     ⟩]
    ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm
       ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂
         (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
       ⟩])
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
      ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
      ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

  (term_partial_setoid_morphism

  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
tm ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) (X ×h Y)
 exact (π₁ (tm_var _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ ((((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)) ]tm
     ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
     π₁ (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
     ⟩]
    ∧ ((π₂ (tm_var (X ×h Y)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)) ]tm
       ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h Y)))
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)),
       π₂
         (π₂ (tm_var ((pr122 (pr2 H)) X Y ×h X ×h Y)))
       ⟩])
   [⟨ π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
      ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)),
      π₂
        (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
      ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y),
   π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
   ≡ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
   ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
     ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))))
  ∧ π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
    ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)

  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ≡ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism

  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~

⊢ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ≡ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
 apply hyperdoctrine_refl.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H

  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)

  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))

π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
  ≡ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)))
 apply hyperdoctrine_refl.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H

  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))

     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))

π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
  ≡ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: ty H
φ:= pair_partial_setoid_morphism
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
  (term_partial_setoid_morphism
     (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
        (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))): partial_setoid_morphism
  (eq_partial_setoid (X ×h Y))
  (prod_partial_setoid (eq_partial_setoid X)
     (eq_partial_setoid Y))
π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))
⊢ π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X ×h Y))

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.
End PreservesBinProductConstant.


H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
preserves_binproduct (functor_to_partial_setoids H)


H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
preserves_binproduct (functor_to_partial_setoids H)

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
BinProducts (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
BinProducts (category_of_partial_setoids H)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ x y : hyperdoctrine_type_category H,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow (category_of_partial_setoids H)
     (?P₂ (functor_to_partial_setoids H x)
        (functor_to_partial_setoids H y))
     (# (functor_to_partial_setoids H)
        (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
           (?P₁ x y)))
     (# (functor_to_partial_setoids H)
        (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
           (?P₁ x y))))

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
BinProducts (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
 exact (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H).
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
BinProducts (category_of_partial_setoids H)
 exact (binproducts_partial_setoid H).
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
∏ x y : hyperdoctrine_type_category H,
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow (category_of_partial_setoids H)
     (binproducts_partial_setoid H
        (functor_to_partial_setoids H x)
        (functor_to_partial_setoids H y))
     (# (functor_to_partial_setoids H)
        (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
           (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H x y)))
     (# (functor_to_partial_setoids H)
        (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
           (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H x y))))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: hyperdoctrine_type_category H
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow (category_of_partial_setoids H)
     (binproducts_partial_setoid H
        (functor_to_partial_setoids H X)
        (functor_to_partial_setoids H Y))
     (# (functor_to_partial_setoids H)
        (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
           (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
     (# (functor_to_partial_setoids H)
        (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
           (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))))

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: hyperdoctrine_type_category H
category_of_partial_setoids H
⟦ binproducts_partial_setoid H
    (functor_to_partial_setoids H X)
    (functor_to_partial_setoids H Y),
functor_to_partial_setoids H
  (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y) ⟧
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: hyperdoctrine_type_category H
is_inverse_in_precat
  (BinProductArrow (category_of_partial_setoids H)
     (binproducts_partial_setoid H
        (functor_to_partial_setoids H X)
        (functor_to_partial_setoids H Y))
     (# (functor_to_partial_setoids H)
        (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
           (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
     (# (functor_to_partial_setoids H)
        (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
           (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))) ?g

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: hyperdoctrine_type_category H
category_of_partial_setoids H
⟦ binproducts_partial_setoid H
    (functor_to_partial_setoids H X)
    (functor_to_partial_setoids H Y),
functor_to_partial_setoids H
  (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y) ⟧
 apply preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: hyperdoctrine_type_category H
is_inverse_in_precat
  (BinProductArrow (category_of_partial_setoids H)
     (binproducts_partial_setoid H
        (functor_to_partial_setoids H X)
        (functor_to_partial_setoids H Y))
     (# (functor_to_partial_setoids H)
        (BinProductPr1 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
           (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y)))
     (# (functor_to_partial_setoids H)
        (BinProductPr2 (hyperdoctrine_type_category H)
           (hyperdoctrine_binproducts H X Y))))
  (preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv
     X Y)
 abstract
        (split ;
         [ apply preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_right
         | apply preserves_binproduct_functor_to_partial_setoids_inv_left ]).
Defined.
